creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 184848
patch

Hi,

It was reported on the forum [1] and privately by email.
here is the backtrace of ttsession:

#0  0x0000000801bf08ce in memset () from /lib/libc.so.7
No symbol table info available.
#1  0x000000080097c2d8 in _Tt_file_system::updateFileSystemEntries() () from /usr/local/dt/lib/libtt.so.2
No symbol table info available.
#2  0x000000080097bfdf in _Tt_file_system::bestMatchToPath(_Tt_string const&) () from /usr/local/dt/lib/libtt.so.2
No symbol table info available.
#3  0x00000008009348c9 in _tt_db_network_path(_Tt_string const&, _Tt_string&, _Tt_string&, _Tt_string&, _Tt_string&) ()
   from /usr/local/dt/lib/libtt.so.2
No symbol table info available.
#4  0x0000000800932d36 in _Tt_db_file::getNetworkPath(_Tt_string const&) () from /usr/local/dt/lib/libtt.so.2
No symbol table info available.
#5  0x0000000800962ca9 in _Tt_pattern::add_netfile(_Tt_string const&, int) () from /usr/local/dt/lib/libtt.so.2

It is fixed upstream:
https://sourceforge.net/p/cdesktopenv/code/ci/5669c8a60f67cc35c58d201e982dccdc4c074592/

[1] https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/61775/
